raw_consumer_statement: Hilton ( one of your cobrand partners on a credit card ) deceptively overcharged me - I am seeking your help in trying to obtain the appropriate credit from Hilton who deceptively overchargred me, then totally dropped the ball in their ( alleged ) attempts to work with me on my complaint. Their actions should NOT reflect the level of service that you are OK with in a cobrand partner. Thank you for your help!
